implementation_drift.description: Inline correction: 'spin glass' (with space) is NOT substring of 'SK-Spin-Glass' (hyphens). Conservative interpretation kept.

honest_note: Spin-glass-NN connection is THE most established stat-mech-to-ML analogy. 5+ direct foundation papers. Software aging in LLM is also published. Verdict obviously FAIL. This is one of the clearest fails of all 25 rounds.
